name: AI-Agentic Daily Data Pipeline - Sanitized Public Export

assignments.name: queries
assignments.value: Robotics Engineer Intern,Autonomous Driving Intern,ML AI Engineer Intern,PLC Engineer Intern,Computer Vision Engineer Intern,Automation Engineer Intern

parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "contents": [
    {
      "parts": [
        {
          "text": {{ JSON.stringify("You are helping adapt a resume for a robotics, AI, or automation internship.

Here is the candidate's base resume:
---
" + $json.resumeText.substring(0, 3000) + "
---

Here is the target job:
Title: " + $json.jobTitle + "
Company: " + $json.company + "
Location: " + $json.location + "
Description:
" + $json.description.substring(0, 3000) + "

INSTRUCTIONS:
1. Keep all factual information accurate and do not invent experience, metrics, employers, schools, or project outcomes.
2. Reorder existing bullets to prioritize relevant skills.
3. Mirror important technical terms from the job description only when they are supported by the resume.
4. Preserve the original resume structure as much as possible.
5. Keep the result concise enough for manual review before applying.
6. Output only the adapted resume text, with no explanations or commentary.

Candidate highlight placeholders to preserve only if present in the source resume:
- Robotics graduate coursework or projects
- ROS 2 / path planning work
- Computer vision or sensor-fusion work
- Manipulation or trajectory-planning work
- Relevant internships, traineeships, or open-source contributions") }}
        }
      ]
    }
  ],
  "generationConfig": {
    "temperature": 0.3,
    "maxOutputTokens": 8192
  }
}

parameters.subject: =Job Automation Error - {{ new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0] }}

nodes.name: Save All Jobs to Google Sheet

main.node: Save All Jobs to Google Sheet
